inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sir dard kar raha hai, bukhar bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although fever and malaise are present, they are non-specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bachcha ka bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, kabz ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are key symptoms of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain can be present in gastroenteritis, but fever pattern is different

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever pattern does not match viral fever

inputs.text: Ab bachche ko tez bukhar ho rahi hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gayi hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: High fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea can be present in gastroenteritis, but fever pattern and weakness are not typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Fever pattern does not match malaria

inputs.text: Bachcha poora thaka hua hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai, khada bhi nahi ho paa raha

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness, continuous high fever, and risk of intestinal perforation confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to fever pattern and severity of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to fever pattern and absence of specific symptoms
